title: Epic: Core omnidist CLI implementation

title: Publish npm patch release for platform package resolution
description: Published @omnidist/omnidist@0.1.1 fails at runtime on global install because shim expects platform package as sibling directory. Need release with require.resolve-based platform package lookup and verify global install on linux/mac/windows.
notes: Code fix committed in b1ce231: shim now resolves @scope/pkg-<platform> via require.resolve. Remaining work: stage/publish v0.1.2 and verify npm i -g @omnidist/omnidist works on target platforms.
close_reason: v0.1.2 tagged, published, and install verified by user.

title: Task: Improve .gitignore for local build output
description:
Ignore local root build artifact A repeatable way to build, package, and publish a Go CLI as an npm-installable tool.

Usage:
  omnidist [command]

Available Commands:
  build       Compile Go binaries for configured targets
  completion  Generate the autocompletion script for the specified shell
  help        Help about any command
  init        Bootstrap npm workspace packaging in existing Go repo
  npm         NPM distribution commands

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for omnidist

Use "omnidist [command] --help" for more information about a command. to keep working tree clean during local builds.
close_reason: Implemented maintainer hardening findings
